chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1421 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Disposed of matter For hearing of M.A. No.1495/2026 (Return of surety) ----------------------------------------------------- 19.02.2026 Mr. Zahoor Tanoli, advocate for applicant/surety Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. ---------------------------------------------------- Applicants/accused Kamran and Qamar Abbas were granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 30.05.2025, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. As per Nazir’s endorsement one Ghulam Mujtaba son of Moharram Ali Memon furnished surety by way of depositing cash amount Rs.100,000/-. Counsel for applicant/surety submits that instant criminal bail application was dismissed and bail granting order dated 30.05.2025 was recalled by this Court vide order dated 03.10.2025, hence the surety furnished is no more required. In view of such position, learned A.P.G. has recorded his no objection for return of surety. In view of above, surety furnished by the applicant/ surety is no more required. Application for return of surety is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety to the applicant/surety upon proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
